terms_section_1_content: Welcome to Homeverse. By using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully before using the platform.
terms_section_2_content: "Platform" refers to the Homeverse website and applications. "User" refers to anyone accessing or using the Platform. "Property" refers to any real estate listed on the Platform. "Agent" refers to any registered real estate agent on the Platform.
terms_section_3_content: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information. All information provided must be accurate and up to date.
terms_section_4_content: All property listings must be accurate and truthfully represent the property. Homeverse reserves the right to remove any listing that violates our guidelines. Sellers and agents are responsible for the accuracy of their listing information.
terms_section_5_content: We respect your privacy and protect your personal data. We will not share your information with third parties without your consent, except as required by law.
terms_section_6_content: Homeverse is a platform intermediary and is not a party to any real estate transaction. We do not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of information provided by users. Users are responsible for independently verifying all information.
terms_section_7_content: For any questions about these terms, please contact us at: info@homeverse.com or call 01015205654.
